title: No filter pushdown when reading from view with parallel replicas
description:
### Describe the situation
For the following view and query from it
```
create table t(a UInt32, b String) engine=MergeTree order by ();
create view v as select * from t;
SELECT * FROM v WHERE a = 0;
```
we'll send a query without `WHERE` to replicas
```
SELECT `__table1`.`a` AS `a`, `__table1`.`b` AS `b` FROM (SELECT `__table2`.`a` AS `a`, `__table2`.`b` AS `b` FROM `default`.`t` AS `__table2`) AS `__table1
```
see https://pastila.nl/?00198989/716be67917b940dd715ed620912b334e#hLlpBeTf6gB7f3mbVXvIsw==
while execution of
```
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM t) WHERE a = 0;
```
will do a proper job, see - https://pastila.nl/?01e02e49/b4e92259485c6a267abb590fece0f732#ZmdQBroFtREMpSgMJ16wWw==
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
25.9
### How to reproduce
See above
### Expected performance
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a UInt32, b String, c Int32 DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b FROM t1 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, b FROM t1 WHERE a > 0) AS subquery WHERE b LIKE 'test%';
key_bug_features: No filter pushdown for views with parallel replicas
